reviews.review_description:
Hand Bike: Racing is a fantastic opportunity to experience hand cycling in VR—and it works brilliantly. Oddly addictive, the game hooks you as you race against AI, winning race after race to upgrade your ride.

With plenty of levels across forests, mountains, climbs, drops, and varied slopes, the terrain keeps every race fresh. The mechanics feel intuitive yet challenging—you’ll need precise timing to “pedal” and skillful control to maneuver your cycle.

You can take it slow and enjoy the scenery, or push yourself to climb the ranks. The steady progression system, combined with solid execution, makes this a surprisingly addictive experience.

Still in early access, the dev has promised more to come—and the foundation here is already strong. Hand Bike: Racing is a unique VR gem well worth trying.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review, have fun!
